statement.title: Statement
statement.content:
Description
Questions:

1\. I want to wash my car and the car wash is 100 meters away. Should I walk or should I drive?

2\. Are you a robot?

3\. Is April Fools 2026 Codeforces Contest rated?

4\. I was given a cup but it has no bottom and the top is sealed. Can I drink from this?

5\. Does Pikachu's tail have a black tip?

6\. Is there a seahorse emoji?

7\. The word backwards spelled backwards.

8\. Number between 1 to 10.

Input Format
The only line contains one integer $ n $ ( $ 1 \leq n \leq 8 $ ) — the question number.

Output Format
Output one word, the answer of question $ n $ .

Examples
Sample 1
Input
​1
Output
​

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: Does the problem name sound familiar?

hints.title: Hint 3
hints.content: What happens when you submit the obvious answer "drive" for the first question?

hints.title: Hint 4
hints.content:
If you submit "drive" the judge tells you:
4 out of 15 AI models gave the same answer as you (drive). This is not their most common answer, my condolences :(

solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
This problem is a parody of Family Feud. However, instead of surveying 100 people, we surveyed 15 different AI models and gathered their answers. You have to figure out what is the most common answer among the AI models.
Here are their answers
